title: Universal Drone Payload Dropper for DJI FLIP/AIR 3S/Mavic 3 Pro – 500g Capacity Aerial Delivery Launcher, Remote Control Release, Type-C Charging, Easy Mount for Gifts & Supplies
features: ✅ ✔【Wide Drone Compatibility】 – This Drone Payload Dropper works with DJI FLIP, AIR 3S, and Mavic 3 Pro. Easy Velcro strap mounting ensures secure attachment without damaging your drone.

✅ ✔【500g Payload & Remote Control】 – Drop small packages, gifts, or emergency supplies (max 500g) with one-button remote release (100m range). Perfect for creative aerial delivery! （Ideal for: Surprise proposals & birthday surprises、Wedding/event confetti showers、Fishing bait launching、Wilderness rescue supply drops.）
✅ ✔【Ultra-Lightweight Design】 – Net weight only 32g – Minimizes impact on drone flight time and stability. Ideal for extended aerial missions.
✅ ✔【USB-C Fast Charging】 – Rechargeable battery with Type-C port (cable included). LED indicator shows power status for hassle-free use.

✅ ✔【Compact & Portable】 – Small size (5.5x5.4x2.6cm), easy to carry.
Includes 1x Dropper + Remote + Cable (Drone not included).
description: 📐 Product Specifications Product Name: Universal Drone Payload Dropper (Compatible with DJI FLIP/AIR 3S/Mavic 3 Pro) Net Weight: 31.5g (Ultra-lightweight design, minimal flight impact) Max Payload Capacity: 500g (Ideal for gifts, emergency supplies, etc.) Control Range: 100m (One-button remote release) Charging Method: Type-C port (charging cable included) Mounting System: Velcro straps (Tool-free installation, drone-safe) Product Dimensions: 5.5 x 5.4 x 2.6cm(2.16*2.13*1.02inch) (Compact design) Package Includes: 1x Payload Dropper / 1x Remote controller / 1x USB-C cable / 1x Velcro straps 🌍 Recommended Uses Special Occasions: Proposal ring drops, birthday surprises Events: Wedding confetti, promotional material delivery Outdoor Activities: Fishing bait deployment, wilderness rescue supplies Commercial Use: Small parcel testing, advertisement distribution ⚙️ Technical Details： Built-in Battery: 3.7V 350mAh lithium battery (rechargeable) Charging Time: Approx. 90 min Operation Time: 12 hours ❗ Important Note: This product is a drone accessory requiring compatible drone (sold separately). Always check your drone's maximum payload capacity before use.
